events.title: Spring Musical: 'The Wizard of Oz' - Friday Evening
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description:
Woodside High School Drama Department presents 'The Wizard of Oz'. Friday evening performance featuring over 50 talented students.

Tickets:
- Adults: $15
- Students/Seniors: $10
- Children under 5: Free

Purchase online: woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted).
Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission.
